allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; pkgs=json.load\(sys.stdin\)[''packages'']; [print\(p[''name'']\) for p in pkgs if ''path'' in p[''name''].lower\(\) or ''selector'' in p[''name''].lower\(\)]")
